case_title: GLOBAN ACCEPTANCE CREDIT COMPANY, LP AKA GA CREDIT VS. TODD SETTERGREN et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $280.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SETTERGREN, TODD
